creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
# service munin-sched start
Starting munin_sched.
Can't locate List/MoreUtils.pm in @INC (you may need to install the List::MoreUtils module) (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.26 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.26/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.26) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/Munin/Node/ProxySpooler.pm line 10.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/Munin/Node/ProxySpooler.pm line 10.
Compilation failed in require at /usr/local/sbin/munin-sched line 34.
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/sbin/munin-sched line 34.
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/munin-sched: WARNING: failed to start munin_sched

Solved by installing lang/p5-List-MoreUtils and its dependecies.

# service munin-sched start
Starting munin_sched.
